name: Impossible Ham & Asparagus
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Smoked ham, fully cooked, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Grease a pie plate.
2. Sprinkle the cubed ham, half of the shredded cheese, asparagus, and onions evenly over the bottom of the greased pie plate.
3. In a blender or food processor, beat together the milk, eggs, Bisquick, salt, and pepper until smooth for 15 seconds at high speed.
4. Pour the batter mixture into the pie plate.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 40-45 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Sprinkle the remaining shredded cheese over the top of the casserole.
7. Let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
8. Serves 6-8.
Note: You can substitute 1 lb (about 2 cups) of fresh asparagus, cut into pieces, if preferred.
